tasks.subject: Task 1: Add Route and Template Skeleton
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Serve a new `/whats-going-on` page with hero section, OG meta tags, and correct head/footer structure matching `index.html`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app.py`
- Create: `templates/whats-going-on.html`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app.py", "templates/whats-going-on.html"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s http://localhost:5111/whats-going-on | grep -c 'og:title'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /whats-going-on returns 200", "OG meta tags present", "Hero renders with countdown and CTA", "Footer matches index.html"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Timeline and Overview Content Sections
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 'The Story' timeline section and 'Two Proposals, One Neighborhood' overview section with narrative content.

**Files:**
- Modify: `templates/whats-going-on.html`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["templates/whats-going-on.html"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s http://localhost:5111/whats-going-on | grep -c 'timeline-entry'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Timeline renders 7 chronological entries", "Overview shows framing quote and Nina Harrison quote", "Sections have animate-in classes", "Correct id attributes for anchor nav"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Annexation and Housing Issue Sections
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the two detailed issue sections with facts, scale visualizations, and key date callouts.

**Files:**
- Modify: `templates/whats-going-on.html`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["templates/whats-going-on.html"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s http://localhost:5111/whats-going-on | grep -c 'key-date-callout'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Annexation section has all sub-sections", "Housing section has scale viz and diff comparison", "Both have correct email addresses", "Both have id anchors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Road Section, Action Section, and Resources
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add road context section, 'What You Can Do' action section with share blocks, and collapsible resources.

**Files:**
- Modify: `templates/whats-going-on.html`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["templates/whats-going-on.html"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s http://localhost:5111/whats-going-on | grep -c 'share-block'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Road section shows 3-phase timeline", "Action section has 4 steps with CTAs", "Share blocks copy to clipboard", "Resources use details/summary", "Final CTA renders"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Explainer-Specific CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add all CSS for explainer page: sticky nav, timeline, scale viz, diff comparison, action steps, share blocks, resources, print styles.

**Files:**
- Modify: `static/css/style.css`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["static/css/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "grep -c 'explainer' static/css/style.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Sticky nav renders and tracks active section", "Timeline has left-border visual line", "Scale viz has amber accent", "Diff comparison side-by-side on desktop", "Print styles hide nav"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Cross-Link from Main Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 'What's going on?' link in main page hero.

**Files:**
- Modify: `templates/index.html`
- Modify: `static/css/style.css`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["templates/index.html", "static/css/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "curl -s http://localhost:5111/ | grep -c 'whats-going-on'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Link appears in hero section", "Navigates to /whats-going-on", "Styled subtly"]}
```
